title: quercus helferiana
intro: Quercus helferiana, also known as Helfer's oak or Himalayan oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quercus helferiana include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and arthritis, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
